name: Archfey
description: A lord or lady of the Feywild; charm, illusion, and fey teleportation.

name: The Fiend
description: A devil or demon; temporary HP on kills, fire, and dark resilience.

name: Great Old One
description: An alien intelligence; telepathy, psychic spells, and creeping madness.

name: The Celestial
description: A being of the upper planes; radiant power and healing light.

name: The Hexblade
description: A sentient weapon of the Shadowfell; curses and martial might.

name: The Fathomless
description: A power of the deep; grasping tentacles, cold, and aquatic magic.

name: The Genie
description: A noble genie; elemental damage and a sheltering magical vessel.

name: The Undead
description: An undead horror; frightening presence and necrotic endurance.
